examples.title: Basic Navigation Component Setup
examples.description: Demonstrates setting up Navigation Component with NavHostFragment and NavController
examples.explanation: This code initializes the Navigation Component by finding the NavHostFragment, getting the NavController, and connecting it to BottomNavigationView for automatic navigation handling.

examples.title: Passing Arguments with Safe Args
examples.description: Shows how to pass data between destinations using Navigation Arguments
examples.explanation: Safe Args generates ProductListFragmentDirections and ProductDetailsFragmentArgs classes. The Directions class provides type-safe navigation actions with arguments, and the Args class retrieves them safely.

examples.title: Handling Deep Links
examples.description: Shows how to implement deep linking in Navigation Component
examples.explanation: Deep links are handled automatically by NavHostFragment. For explicit deep link handling in onNewIntent(), call handleDeepLink() on the NavController. The navigation graph's deepLink element maps URIs to destinations.
